creator: abryan@centraldesktop.com
text:
The main freebsd.org website port search is returning old data.

I just did a search for "jetty" and got results which show the old version of the port.  portsnap on a machine shows a much newer one.

At the bottom of the results page you can see that the DB for the web search is out of date:

"Last database update: 2012-11-11 10:45:48 UTC"

How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=jetty&stype=all
